title: Extracted Catalogue Series Service Routes
summary: Moved Local Studio series-create and series-save catalogue routes from fake in-process `catalogue_write_server.Handler` reuse to callable service functions in `scripts/catalogue/catalogue_write_service.py`.
effect: Series create/save now use the direct catalogue service boundary while preserving member-work update planning, transaction writes, lookup refreshes, field-registry build planning, optional public build follow-through, and Studio Activity behavior.
